dataHandling.pmAid: Local scans. No code upload. No LLM token spend for repository inspection.
dataHandling.pmPrivacyGuard: Classifies, sanitizes, tokenizes, and routes messages without storing message content.

limitations: No fake MCP or OpenAPI contract is published.
Paid findings and remediation detail remain behind purchase.
